mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id AND ur.tenant_id = r.tenant_id JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id JOIN sys_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND r.`status` = 1 AND r.deleted = 0
